market_pulse: Competitive venues ramping post-EDC with major talent commitments (Calvin Harris, Diplo, DJ Snake, Tiësto); OMNIA Dayclub launches May 15 with Martin Garrix and Rüfüs Du Sol; Tao Beach delivering strong EDC week programming.
